title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, discusses scaling challenges at Shopify during flash sales, why new database companies emerge every 15 years, and the state of AI coding agents. The conversation covers infrastructure evolution in the 2010s and what distinguishes top-tier engineers in the AI era.
